data.title: Unbuzzd Wellness Inc. starts Reg D capital raise to fund growth, IPO; assures no dilution for Quantum BioPharma shareholders.
data.description: The latest offering by Quantum BioPharma will not result in any dilution for the shareholders. This offering, which is aimed at raising funds, is designed to avoid negatively impacting the ownership percentage for existing shareholders. This move is expected to bring in a substantial amount of capital without reducing the stake held by current shareholders. This non-dilutive offering is seen as a strategic approach to securing additional funds without compromising the ownership interests of investors.

data.title: Jackbit Crypto Casino, popular among US players in 2025, offers 6,000+ games, supports 16+ cryptocurrencies, and eliminates rigid KYC requirements for most transactions. Operated by Ryker B.V., licensed in Curacao, and valued for its privacy-first approach.
data.description: Jackbit Crypto Casino, established in 2022 and operated by Ryker B.V., has become a leading US crypto casino known for its emphasis on privacy, fast payouts, and extensive game selection. It offers over 6,000 games from 90+ prominent game studios, covering slots, live dealer options, and sportsbook markets. The platform supports 16+ cryptocurrencies and has a no-KYC policy for most transactions, except for large withdrawals. Along with advanced security measures like SSL encryption and regular audits, Jackbit also offers a user-friendly interface, regular updates, and community-focused features like tournaments and VIP programs. The casino's unique selling points include its focus on player autonomy and personal privacy, key factors contributing to its popularity among both seasoned crypto gamblers and newcomers.

data.title: OlivePoint Capital buys Stella on the Park, a mixed-use project in Denver, with 216 units and 35,000 sq ft of retail space, at over 50% off.
data.description: In Denver, OlivePoint Capital, a real estate investment manager specializing in value-add and special situation opportunities in the lower middle market, has revealed the purchase of Stella on the Park, a mixed-use project built in 2021 in metro Denver. This acquisition, conducted off-market, includes 216 residential units and 35,000 square feet of retail space. OlivePoint secured the asset at over a 50% markdown compared to its replacement value.

data.title: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) releases Q2 results, visit http://investor.spglobal.com/Quarterly-Earnings for details.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced its financial results for the second quarter. The company's earnings report and additional resources can be accessed at a provided link. For further details on supplemental information, conference call schedules, and webcast information, interested parties can visit the aforementioned website.

data.title: Orrön Energy sells 76 MW solar project in Germany to Saxovent Renewables for MEUR 4.0, with MEUR 2.0 paid at closing.
data.description: Orrön Energy AB is excited to share that they have finalized a deal with Saxovent Renewables to sell a 76-megawatt solar project in Germany. The total value of the agreement is MEUR 4.0, with MEUR 2.0 paid at closing and the remainder dependent on municipal and legislative approvals.

data.title: Blue Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: BACCU) allows separate trading of Class A shares and Share Rights from August 4, 2025.
data.description: A company based in Newport Beach, California, Blue Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: BACCU), revealed that starting from August 4, 2025, investors who purchased units in the Company's initial public offering will have the option to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares.

data.title: GreenHill Investment Reporting gets TSG certification for ReportQuest platform, meeting performance standards. GAITHERSBURG, Md., July 31, 2025.
data.description: GreenHill Investment Reporting, a top independent investment performance measurement solutions provider, based in GAITHERSBURG, Md., made an announcement on July 31, 2025. The platform has successfully met high standards for accuracy and reliability. This achievement solidifies GreenHill's position in the industry.

data.title: Bill Eager appointed President of S&P Global Mobility and future CEO; Edouard Tavernier transitions to advisor role until 2025. S&P Global announces Q2 results.
data.description: Edouard Tavernier will shift to a Strategic Advisor position until September 30, 2025. S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) disclosed their Second Quarter 2025 results separately. A conference call is scheduled today at 8:30 a.m. EDT.

data.title: Sound Blade Medical appoints Neil Barman, M.D. as CEO; founder Jeremy Brown, Ph.D. to remain as CTO. HALIFAX, NS. July 31, 2025.
data.description: In a recent update on July 31, 2025, Sound Blade Medical, Inc. revealed that Dr. Jeremy Brown, the company's founder with a Ph.D., will remain in his role as Chief Technical Officer. This decision underscores his pivotal role in steering the scientific direction of the company. Moreover, the company appointed Dr. Neil Barman, M.D., as their new Chief Executive Officer. Sound Blade Medical, renowned for its expertise in handheld histotripsy therapy, sees Dr. Barman stepping into this crucial leadership role to drive the company forward.

Troop of wild monkeys seen climbing and swimming in SW China A group of wild macaques was caught on camera swimming across a river and scaling a steep cliff in Huaning County, Yunnan Province. Local rangers captured the incredible moment during a routine patrol.

data.title: Coinbase's video mocks UK finance, as nearly half of adults face financial vulnerability amid struggling economy.
data.description: A humorous video created by Coinbase pokes fun at Britain's ailing economy, highlighting the struggles faced by the country. Recent data reveals that almost 50% of UK adults are facing financial vulnerability.

data.title: FOXO Tech renews license for Myrtle Recovery Centers in TN for another year after successful inspection by state.
data.description: FOXO Technologies, Inc. revealed that its behavioral health arm, Myrtle Recovery Centers, Inc., has successfully secured the renewal of its operating license for the Oneida, TN facility for an additional year. This renewal allows the facility to continue operating as an alcohol and drug residential treatment center. The State of Tennessee’s Department of Mental Health and Substance Abuse Services granted the renewal following a positive annual inspection. This signifies a significant milestone for FOXO and its subsidiary, ensuring continued provision of vital services to the community in need.

data.title: HII announced its second quarter 2025 results in Newport News, Va., on July 31, 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Newport News, Virginia, HII announced their second-quarter fiscal 2025 results. The company trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "HII."

data.title: Stagwell Inc (NASDAQ: STGW) reports Q2 YoY revenue growth of 5%, net revenue growth of 8%, and a net loss of $5 million. Adjusted EBITDA is $93 million.
data.description: In the second quarter, there was a 5% year-over-year increase in revenue and an 8% year-over-year growth in net revenue. Excluding the impact of advocacy, net revenue grew by 10%. Specifically in digital transformation, net revenue excluding advocacy saw a growth of 12%. The net loss attributable to Stagwell Inc. common shareholders in Q2 was $5 million. Adjusted EBITDA for the same period stood at $93 million.
